title: BPSC Civil Judge PCS J Online Form 2026
description: BPSC Bihar Civil Judge PCS J Recruitment 2026 Apply Online for 173 Post Post Update Date: 23-02-2026 Short Description: Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) has released the notification for the recruitment of Judicial Services Competitive 33 Examination 2026. Those Candidates Are Interested to the Following BPSC Civil Judge PCS J Exam 2026 Vacancy Can Apply Online from 25/02/2026 to 18/03/2026. See the advertisement for information related to age limit, syllabus, Department wise post, sele...
